raw: This pass admits up to 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person ($9.50 per person); any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. Children under one year of age are admitted free.

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: 1/2 price admission per person ($9.50 per person)
source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under one year of age are admitted free
